active_projects.description: Create /finance command (finance.md), research skill (skill-finance/SKILL.md), and research agent (finance-agent.md) for the founder extension. Command uses AUDIT/MODEL/FORECAST/VALIDATE modes with 5 forcing questions. Skill follows 11-stage execution pattern. Agent analyzes existing financial documents, extracts numbers, and creates verification spreadsheets (.xlsx) to confirm/improve calculations.

Create context files for the finance feature: domain/financial-analysis.md (frameworks for document analysis, verification methodology, spreadsheet validation), patterns/financial-forcing-questions.md (question framework for financial document review), and templates/financial-analysis.md (report template for finance research output).

Wire /finance into the founder extension: add finance-agent, skill-finance, and /finance command to manifest.json routing tables. Add context entries to index-entries.json. Update EXTENSION.md documentation. Optionally add financial-analysis.typ Typst template.

Update skill-founder-plan and skill-founder-implement to extract task_type from state.json and include it in the task_context passed to agents. Currently task_type is stored by commands but never reaches the plan or implement agents.

artifacts.summary: Gap analysis: task_type stored by commands but not passed through skill-founder-plan/implement to agents
3-phase plan: update 2 skills (senders) and 2 agents (receivers) to pass task_type through delegation

active_projects.completion_summary: Added task_type field to founder delegation pipeline. Both skills now extract task_type from state.json and pass it to agents. Plan agent uses task_type as primary report type determination with keyword fallback for legacy tasks.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Updated 4 founder extension files: skill-founder-plan, skill-founder-implement, founder-plan-agent, founder-implement-agent - all now include task_type in delegation context

active_projects.description: Update founder-plan-agent so Phase 4 plans Typst as primary output for ALL founder types (not just project-timeline), and Phase 5 plans PDF compilation. Markdown becomes fallback. Currently only project-timeline outputs Typst; all other types plan markdown as primary with Typst as optional Phase 5.

artifacts.summary: Research report analyzing current Phase 4/5 structure and changes needed to make Typst primary output for all founder types
5-phase implementation plan for making Typst primary output in founder plan and implement agents

active_projects.description: Update founder-implement-agent Phase 4 to generate .typ files directly for ALL report types (like project-timeline already does), and Phase 5 to compile PDF. Currently Phase 4 writes markdown for non-project-timeline types and Phase 5 generates Typst as optional add-on.

artifacts.summary: Research report with 14 sections requiring changes across the 1564-line founder-implement-agent.md

active_projects.description: Migrate agent system commands and skills to be compatible with Claude Code v2.1.88+. Commands in .claude/commands/ are not loading (no autocomplete, no invocation). Key issues: stale model IDs (claude-opus-4-5-20251101 -> claude-opus-4-6), potential format changes in the commands-to-skills unification, SlashCommand tool removed in favor of Skill tool, description budget constraints (250 char cap, 1% context budget). May require converting commands to skills format (.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md) or updating frontmatter.

artifacts.summary: 6 issues found: missing Skill permission, stale model IDs, name collisions, missing frontmatter, deprecated TodoWrite, description budget
5-phase plan: fix permissions, update model IDs, fix frontmatter/deprecated tools, resolve name collisions, update documentation
4 of 5 phases completed: permissions fixed, model IDs updated, frontmatter/deprecated tools fixed, documentation updated. Phase 4 skipped per user decision.

active_projects.completion_summary: Upgraded agent system for Claude Code v2.1.88+ compatibility: added Skill tool to permissions, replaced TodoWrite with TaskCreate/TaskUpdate, updated model IDs from claude-opus-4-5-20251101 to opus alias, added frontmatter to refresh.md, set SLASH_COMMAND_TOOL_CHAR_BUDGET env var, and updated Co-Authored-By references to Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context).

active_projects.description: Full audit of all 181 index.json entries to ensure commands are appropriately scoped to their domains. Verify no domain-specific files have generic commands like /plan, /implement, /research.
active_projects.completion_summary: Audited all 181 deployed index.json entries and 14 extension source files. Deployed index was clean (0 project/* entries with generic commands). Fixed founder extension source (index-entries.json) which still had /plan and /implement in 22 entries despite task 324. Added command scope validation check to context-discovery.md documenting the rule that project/* entries must not use generic workflow commands.

active_projects.description: Remove generic commands (/plan, /implement) from 15+ founder domain files in index.json. These should only match language='founder', not all planning/implementation tasks.
active_projects.completion_summary: Removed /plan and /implement from 22 founder extension index entries in both source (extensions/founder/index-entries.json) and deployed (Vision/.claude/context/index.json). Founder files now only match via domain-specific commands (/market, /analyze, /strategy, /legal, /project, /sheet) and language='founder', preventing unwanted loading during non-founder /plan and /implement operations.

active_projects.description: Fix jq query in planner-agent.md and other agents to use `any()` function instead of `[]?` with OR, preventing duplicate results when entries match multiple conditions. Currently returns 87 files with 34 duplicates.
active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed jq query duplicate bug in 6 files by replacing (.load_when.X[]? == val) with any(.load_when.X[]?; . == val) in all combined OR queries. Fixed: planner-agent.md, general-implementation-agent.md, general-research-agent.md, CLAUDE.md, context-discovery.md (2 queries), grant-agent.md (3 queries). Single-dimension selects (no OR) were left unchanged as they are safe.
Added REVIEW mode to /project command with 7-category analysis framework, 5 forcing questions, and 4-tier severity output. Supports file paths (Typst, Markdown, JSON) and task number inputs.

artifacts.summary: REVIEW mode design: 7-category analysis framework, 5 forcing questions, 4-tier severity output
3-phase implementation plan for REVIEW mode: project.md updates, agent stages, integration testing
Execution summary: 3 phases completed, ~415 lines added to project.md and project-agent.md
Implementation complete: project.md (+120 lines), project-agent.md (+295 lines)
Comprehensive analysis of Neovim and WezTerm configurations showing no automatic directory-changing behavior
Research report documenting OAuth2 token expiration as root cause and fix procedure
3-phase implementation plan for fixing Gmail OAuth2 authentication
